title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Job Summary

We are looking for a Full-Stack Developer with 5–7 years of experience in developing and maintaining web applications. The candidate should have hands-on experience in frontend, backend, API integration, and database management.


Key Responsibilities

· Develop and maintain scalable web applications

· Work on both frontend and backend development

· Build responsive UI using React / Angular / Vue

· Develop APIs using Node.js ,Python .

· Manage databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB

· Optimize application performance and troubleshoot issues

· Support deployments and CI/CD processes

· Collaborate with QA, UI/UX, and DevOps teams



Required Skills

· 5–7 years of full-stack development experience

· Strong knowledge of JavaScript / TypeScript

· Experience with frontend frameworks and backend APIs

· Good understanding of SQL / NoSQL databases

· Familiarity with Git, Docker, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)

· Strong debugging and problem-solving skills

title: Remote Java Backend Engineer
descriptionHtml:
About the projects: we are building LLM evaluation and training datasets to train LLM to work on realistic software engineering problems. One of our approaches, in this project, is to build verifiable SWE tasks based on public repository histories in a synthetic approach with human-in-the-loop; while expanding the dataset coverage to different types of tasks in terms of programming language, difficulty level, and etc.


About the Role:

We are looking for experienced software engineers (tech lead level) who are familiar with high-quality public GitHub repositories and can contribute to this project. This role involves hands-on software engineering work, including development environment automation, issue triaging, and evaluating test coverage and quality


Why Join Us?

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems. You’ll be at the forefront of evaluating how LLMs interact with real code, influencing the future of AI-assisted software development. This is a unique opportunity to blend practical software engineering with AI research.


What does day-to-day look like:

  • Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open-source libraries.
  • Set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup.
  • Evaluating unit test coverage and quality.
  • Modify and run codebases locally to assess LLM performance in bug-fixing scenarios.
  • Collaborate with researchers to design and identify repositories and issues that are challenging for LLMs.
  • Opportunities to lead a team of junior engineers to collaborate on projects.


Required Skills:

  • Minimum 3+ years of overall experience
  • Strong experience with at least one of the following languages: Java
  • Proficiency with Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup.
  • Ability to understand and navigate complex codebases.
  • Comfortable running, modifying, and testing real-world projects locally.
  • Experience contributing to or evaluating open-source projects is a plus.


Nice to Have:

  • Previous participation in LLM research or evaluation projects.
  • Experience building or testing developer tools or automation agents.
  • Perks of Freelancing With Turing:
  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.


Offer Details:

  • Commitments Required: At least 4 hours per day and minimum 20 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST. (We have 3 options of time commitment: 20 hrs/week, 30 hrs/week or 40 hrs/week)
  • Employment type: Contractor assignment (no medical/paid leave)


After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.

descriptionHtml:
Role : Core.Net Fullstack, with Angular or React with SQL & Azure

YOE : 6 to 10

Location: Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Kochi, Trivandrum, Chennai.


JD:

Short Job Description: We are seeking a skilled .NET Full Stack Developer with expertise in building scalable web applications using .NET Core, Angular/React, and SQL, with strong exposure to Azure cloud services. The candidate should be proficient in developing RESTful APIs, designing robust backend systems, and creating responsive front-end interfaces.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain full-stack applications using .NET Core and Angular/React
  • Design and implement REST APIs and microservices
  • Work with SQL Server for database design, optimization, and queries
  • Deploy and manage applications on Microsoft Azure
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams and follow Agile practices
  • Ensure code quality, performance, and security best practices

title: Senior Manager - Markets - National - CBS - C&I - Markets Leadership - Bangalore
descriptionHtml:
Requisition Id: 1699120

As a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction and advisory services, we hire and develop the most passionate people in their field to help build a better working world. This starts with a culture that believes in giving you the training, opportunities and creative freedom. At EY, we don't just focus on who you are now, but who you can become. We believe that it’s your career and ‘It’s yours to build’ which means potential here is limitless and we'll provide you with motivating and fulfilling experiences throughout your career to help you on the path to becoming your best professional self.

The opportunity : Senior Manager-National-Markets-CBS - C&I - Markets Leadership - Bangalore

National :

National comprises of sector agnostic teams working across industries for a well rounded experience.

CBS - C&I - Markets Leadership :

Our Markets team focuses on providing account teams with the support they need to help drive revenue growth. Our "account-centric" approach to serving clients starts with understanding their business and providing tools and enablers to provide consistency on how we identify and align our services and solutions to our clients' most pressing issues. We deliver services through one or more of our four global service lines: Assurance, Consulting, Strategy and Transactions and Tax. Our Markets team comprises of Business Development and Brand Media & Communication (BMC).

By adopting EY methodologies, executing on guidance, and leveraging tools and strategic programs, we bring the necessary rigor to our engagements. And by accessing our latest EY insights, solutions and client conversation tools, we have more meaningful conversations with our clients to help shape their thinking and generate additional value creation.

Your Key Responsibilities

Technical Excellence

  • We are looking for a Principal Engineer to provide deep technical leadership across our product engineering organization. This is a senior individual contributor role focused primarily on backend systems, architecture, and platform scalability. The ideal candidate is an exceptional backend engineer and system thinker who can design and build highly scalable, reliable, and secure distributed systems while remaining hands-on with implementation. Exposure to modern AI-driven development approaches, including Agentic Engineering tools and frameworks, is considered a strong plus. However, prior experience building agentic applications is not mandatory for this role. This role requires a hands-on technologist who can code, prototype, review architecture, unblock teams, and raise the engineering bar across multiple squads.

Skills And Attributes

To qualify for the role you must have

Qualification

  • Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

Experience

  • Backend Development (3+ years)
  • Frontend Development (2+ years)

What We Look For

People with the ability to work in a collaborative manner to provide services across multiple client departments while following the commercial and legal requirements. You will need a practical approach to solving issues and complex problems with the ability to deliver insightful and practical solutions. We look for people who are agile, curious, mindful, and able to sustain positive energy, while being adaptable and creative in their approach.

What We Offer

Fuelled by the brilliance of our people, EY has emerged as the strongest brand and the most attractive employer in our field, with market-leading growth over competitors. Our people work side-by-side with market-leading entrepreneurs, game-changers, disruptors, and visionaries. As an organization, we are investing more time, technology, and money than ever before in skills and learning for our people. At EY, you will have a personalized Career Journey and also the chance to tap into the resources of our career frameworks to better know about your roles, skills, and opportunities.

EY is equally committed to being an inclusive employer, and we strive to achieve the right balance for our people—enabling us to deliver excellent client service while allowing our people to build their careers as well as focus on their wellbeing.

If you can confidently demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, please contact us as soon as possible.

Join us in shaping the future with confidence. Apply Now

descriptionText:
About the projects: we are building LLM evaluation and training datasets to train LLM to work on realistic software engineering problems. One of our approaches, in this project, is to build verifiable SWE tasks based on public repository histories in a synthetic approach with human-in-the-loop; while expanding the dataset coverage to different types of tasks in terms of programming language, difficulty level, and etc.


About the Role: 
We are looking for experienced software engineers (tech lead level) who are familiar with high-quality public GitHub repositories and can contribute to this project. This role involves hands-on software engineering work, including development environment automation, issue triaging, and evaluating test coverage and quality


Why Join Us? 
Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems. You’ll be at the forefront of evaluating how LLMs interact with real code, influencing the future of AI-assisted software development. This is a unique opportunity to blend practical software engineering with AI research.


What does day-to-day look like:

- Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open-source libraries.
- Set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup.
- Evaluating unit test coverage and quality.
- Modify and run codebases locally to assess LLM performance in bug-fixing scenarios.
- Collaborate with researchers to design and identify repositories and issues that are challenging for LLMs.
- Opportunities to lead a team of junior engineers to collaborate on projects.


Required Skills:

- Minimum 3+ years of overall experience
- Strong experience with at least one of the following languages: Java
- Proficiency with Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup.
- Ability to understand and navigate complex codebases.
- Comfortable running, modifying, and testing real-world projects locally.
- Experience contributing to or evaluating open-source projects is a plus.


Nice to Have:

- Previous participation in LLM research or evaluation projects.

title: Sr AEM Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Our Mission

At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

Who We Are

In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!

We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real-time problem-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.

Job Summary

Job Summary

As a Sr AEM Full Stack Developer in our Digital Marketing group, you will be the bridge between creative design and technical implementation. You will build high performance, accessible, and scalable web experiences that serve millions of users globally. You will work within a cross functional team of UX designers, AEM backend engineers, and product marketers to transform Figma designs into modular, and reusable AEM components.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, Develop and maintain high performing digital experiences using the AEM platform to support multi-site, multi-channel and multi-lingual delivery environments.
  • Design and Develop custom reusable components, templates and client libraries using HTL (Sightly), Sling Models, HTML5, CSS3 and JavaScript (ES6+).
  • Create intuitive AEM Dialogs and configuring Touch UI to empower content authors to manage site content without technical intervention.
  • Design and develop Workflows and OSGi Services using Java and integrate with third-party systems using RESTful APIs.
  • Integrate AEM with third party marketing tools such as Adobe Target, Adobe Analytics (Launch), and Demandbase to drive personalization and data driven marketing.
  • Create responsive marketing landing pages and microsites, for multi-language deployment.
  • Ensure the performance, scalability, and security of the AEM environment, including Dispatcher configuration and caching strategies.
  • Partner with UX, backend, QA, and creative teams to ensure "pixel perfect" execution of designs while providing technical feedback on feasibility and performance.
  • Assist in deploying applications, platform upgrades and migrations.
  • Assist in routine daily maintenance of existing sites and applications.
  • Participate in Agile ceremonies, code reviews and maintain documentation for front end architecture and component usage for content authors.

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

  • BS/MS in Computer Science, Design, or a related technical field.
  • 6+ years of web development experience, with at least 4+ years specifically focused on Adobe Experience Manager.
  • Expert-level proficiency in HTL (Sightly), AEM Templates and Components, AEM Client Libraries (ClientLibs), Sling Models and RESTful APIs integration.
  • Solid experience in HTML5, CSS3 (SASS/LESS), Modern JavaScript (ES6+) and Responsive design frameworks.
  • Expert in developing Workflows and OSGi Service components.
  • Strong proficiency in Java, OSGi, Sling, and JCR (Java Content Repository).
  • Proficient knowledge of the end-to-end content lifecycle, web content management, content publishing / deployment, and delivery processes.
  • Experience in integrating AEM with enterprise backend systems and other products.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Previous experience in a B2B Tech or Cybersecurity environment is a major plus.
  • A "growth mindset" curious, collaborative, and comfortable in a fast-paced, "disruptive" environment.
  • Experience collaborating with distributed global teams.
  • Knowledge of accessibility standards, On-Page SEO and best practices.
  • Ability to work in a fast paced environment and deliver high-quality work with minimal oversight.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

Our Commitment

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.

Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

title: Technical Product Manager
descriptionHtml:
About the Company

Who are we?

Whatfix is an AI platform advancing the “userization” of enterprise applications, empowering companies to maximize the ROI of their digital investments. Technology needs adoption. It’s no different for AI. As AI reshapes roles, workflows, and human-machine interactions, it also introduces new layers of complexity and user friction. This is where Whatfix plays a pivotal role. A decade old DNA of empowering people to succeed with technology and not replacing them. We call this philosophy Userization: the belief that technology must adapt to the user, not the other way around.

At the heart of userization philosophy is ScreenSense, our proprietary AI engine, which continuously interprets both the context of what users are doing in an application or an AI tool and the intent behind their actions. By combining these signals, Whatfix delivers real-time guidance, nudges, knowledge, and automation directly in the flow of work.

This intelligence powers our entire product suite.

  • Digital Adoption helps users get productive faster.
  • Product Analytics uncovers friction and closes adoption gaps.
  • Mirror allows employees to train in safe, simulated environments.

These are embedded with Whatfix AI Agents which supercharge creation, insights, and user guidance.

Our upcoming AI-first products are already creating a buzz in the market.

  • Seek is an AI-native assistant that not only knows your business context but can also act across applications to get work done on your behalf.
  • Whatfix Mirror 2.0 is the world’s only System plus Role simulation with a complete assessment to lead the Gen AI simulation category.

Together, these products reflect Whatfix’s commitment to building enterprise-ready AI teammates that maximize productivity and ROI. It gives users a unified, intelligent way to find answers across systems, apps, and knowledge silos and helps anyone looking to deliver fast and contextual answers.

Whatfix is bridging the gap between rapid technological change and human enablement—ensuring AI is not only embedded but also usable, trusted, and outcome-driven for every employee.

At Whatfix, we’re not just making software easier—we’re making AI work for people.

The company has seven offices across the US, India, UK, Germany, Singapore, and Australia and a presence across 40+ countries.

Customers: 700+ enterprise customers, including 80+ Fortune 500 companies such as Shell, Schneider Electric, and UPS Supply Chain Solutions.

Investors: A total of ~$270 million USD has been raised as yet. Most recently Series E round of $125 Million USD led by Warburg Pincus, with participation from existing investor SoftBank Vision Fund 2. Other investors include Cisco Investments, Eight Roads Ventures (A division of Fidelity Investments), Dragoneer, Peak XV Partners, and Stellaris Venture Partners.

Whatfix’s leadership is consistently recognized across top industry analysts and business rankings:

  • Won the 2025 AI Breakthrough Award for the Overall AI-based Analytics Solution of the Year.
  • Only DAP to be recognized as a “Leader” across various DAP reports for the past 5+ years by leading analyst firms like Gartner, Forrester, IDC, and Everest Group.
  • With over 45% YoY sustainable annual recurring revenue (ARR) growth, Whatfix is among the “Top 50 Indian Software Companies” as per G2 Best Software Awards.
  • Named a Gartner Customers’ Choice for DAP for the second year in a row (2024 and 2025)—the only vendor in the market to earn this distinction consecutively.
  • We also boast a star rating of 4.6 on G2 Crowd, 4.5 on Gartner Peer Insights, and a super-high CSAT of 99.8%
  • Stevie Award winner in the category (Bronze): Customer Service Department of the Year – Computer Software - 100 or More Employees.
  • Winner of the ISG Paragon Innovation Award in partnership with Sophos (customer) for the EMEA region and finalist in the Transformation Award category.
  • RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards winner for “Software Asset Management Solution of the Year.”

These recognitions are matched by business performance:

  • Highest-Ranking DAP on 2023 Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ North America for Fifth Consecutive Year.
  • Listed on the Financial Times & Statista's High-Growth Companies Asia-Pacific 2025 list.
  • Won the Silver for Stevie's Employer of the Year 2023 – Computer Software category and also recognized as Great Place to Work 2022-2023.
  • Only DAP to be among the top 35% companies worldwide in sustainability excellence with EcoVadis Bronze Medal.

Be one of the key Leaders in this awesome journey of building a billion-dollar company!


About the role: Software Development experience is a must


We are looking for a Product Manager who is passionate about solving complex problems within the B2B enterprise space and preferably has addressed concerns around product adoption with use cases such as onboarding / First time use & ongoing discovery & learning. You will be part of a close-knit motivated team of rock stars both on the engineering/development & Go to Market (GTM) side.


About the role: Previous Software Developer experience is a must.


We are looking for a Product Manager who is passionate about solving complex problems within the B2B enterprise space and preferably has addressed concerns around product adoption with use cases such as onboarding / First time use & ongoing discovery & learning. You will be part of a close-knit motivated team of rock stars both on the engineering/development & Go to Market (GTM) side.


What do you get to do?

  • Gain deep understanding of customer/user problems, workflows & drive solutions resulting in simple, engaging & delightful experiences starting from prototypes to detailed requirements
  • Develop & maintain a dynamic product plan adapting to customer, market needs, competition and aligned with internal & external stakeholders
  • Translate problems, opportunities into detailed requirements identifying the “end state”, breaking down them into “iterations” by working with development teams with a bias towards faster time to market
  • Ability to stack rank stories with effective balance of customer benefit/value, applicability to broader target market and utilization of Whatfix
  • Build consensus across stakeholders – Customer/Customer Success, GTM, development clearly articulating the product decisions and choices
  • Drive product launches including working with PR team, R&D, design, sales & marketing
  • Act as a product evangelist to build awareness and understanding for both internal & external stakeholders


What you need to have/ bring to the table:

  • Prior experience as a Full stack Developer (mandatory), with at least 3 to 6 years of Product Management experience and total industry experience not exceeding 6 years
  • Comfortable conducting customer interviews remotely and in person and deep empathy with customer workflows & pain points
  • Experience of taking decisions based on validated learning combining qualitative and quantitative data analysis (Knowledge of Analytical and Data Mining tool is a plus)
  • Knowledge of lean methodology, agile & iterative development
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Prior experience as a Full stack Developer (mandatory), with at least 3 to 6 years of Product Management experience and total industry experience not exceeding 6 years
- Comfortable conducting customer interviews remotely and in person and deep empathy with customer workflows & pain points
- Experience of taking decisions based on validated learning combining qualitative and quantitative data analysis (Knowledge of Analytical and Data Mining tool is a plus)
- Knowledge of lean methodology, agile & iterative development
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

title: Senior Backend Developer (Crypto / Blockchain)
descriptionHtml:
About Borderless:

Borderless empowers individuals in India, the Middle East, and South-East Asia to globalize their wealth effortlessly. Our all-in-one platform lets you save and make payments globally while investing in the U.S., ensuring your money moves without limits. With Borderless, you can easily open and manage U.S. investment accounts. Our big data-driven insights help you track your portfolio, make smarter decisions, and uncover new opportunities—without drowning in complex research.

Beyond investing, Borderless offers a 4-in-1 financial solution:

  • Multi-Currency Account – Save and hold funds in multiple currencies worldwide.

  • Investment Platform – Invest exclusively in U.S. markets.

  • Hedge Funds – Access exclusive U.S. investment opportunities.

  • Borderless Payments – Transfer money seamlessly across borders.

Backed by industry veterans, Borderless delivers a seamless, secure, and powerful financial experience for HNIs and retail investors alike. Under the hood, our blockchain-powered Easy Remit rails make cross-border transfers faster, more transparent, and significantly more cost-efficient.

Role Overview:

We’re looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who can architect, build, and scale critical backend systems. You’ll work on high-throughput financial workflows, third-party integrations, and transaction-heavy systems - potentially including crypto/blockchain rails as we expand.

This is not a “ticket-closing” role. This is a systems-thinking, architecture-owning role.

What You’ll Do

  • Design and own scalable backend architecture

  • Build high-performance APIs handling real-money transactions

  • Lead system design discussions and technical decisions

  • Architect reliable integrations with financial institutions, brokers, payment partners, and crypto/blockchain providers

  • Improve system resilience, observability, and fault tolerance

  • Optimize databases and reduce latency across services

  • Establish engineering best practices and mentor junior engineers

  • Handle production incidents and drive long-term fixes

Tech Stack

  • Our backend is primarily built on Node.js, with Python used for select services.

  • We use Express.js and FastAPI to build scalable APIs.

  • Our data layer runs on PostgreSQL and MongoDB, with Redis used for caching and performance optimization.

  • We leverage Kafka and RabbitMQ for asynchronous and event-driven workflows.

  • Our infrastructure is hosted on AWS, with Docker and CI/CD pipelines enabling smooth deployments.

  • We design and maintain REST APIs and Webhooks for integrations.

  • Infrastructure: AWS / GCP (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, IAM, VPC and equivalent)

  • Containerization & CI/CD: Docker, automated pipelines

  • API Standards: REST, Webhooks, async callbacks

  • Security: OAuth2, JWT, encryption at rest and in transit



Requirements

What We’re Looking For

  • 6–8 years of strong backend engineering experience with 2+ years leading architecture or owning critical systems

  • Deep understanding of distributed systems and system design

  • Experience building high-transaction, low-latency systems

  • Strong experience with database optimization and scaling

  • Production experience with AWS and google cloud infrastructure

  • Experience in crypto / blockchain / digital assets infrastructure is highly preferred

Domain Knowledge (Highly Preferred)

  • Crypto / blockchain infrastructure

  • Wallet architecture (custodial or non-custodial)

  • On-chain vs off-chain transaction workflows

  • Stablecoins, token transfers, gas mechanics

  • Banking rails (ACH, SWIFT, RTGS, SEPA)

  • Understanding of compliance-sensitive systems (KYC/AML flows)

Leadership & Ownership

  • Strong technical decision-making skills

  • Ability to balance speed vs. system safety

  • Comfortable operating in high-accountability environments

  • Clear communicator with product and business stakeholders



Benefits

Why Borderless?

  • A Global Impact: You’ll help people across Asia, the Middle East, and India unlock global investing opportunities.

  • A Supportive Team: Work with smart, passionate colleagues who are as committed to your growth as you are to theirs.

  • Exciting Growth: Be part of an innovative platform that’s changing how people invest globally - every day brings new opportunities!

  • A Fun Environment: Work hard, play hard, and enjoy the dynamic culture of a startup that’s pushing the boundaries in fintech!

title: Principal Engineer, Software Engineering
descriptionHtml:
Our Mission

At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

Who We Are

In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!

We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real-time problem-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly motivated Principal Backend Engineer to lead and grow development teams working on Prisma Cloud and Cortex Cloud, Palo Alto Networks’ leading platforms for cloud security and security operations. We are looking for candidates with a can-do attitude, who are passionate about complex problems and thrive on bringing value to thousands of customers.

Job Requirements

  • End-to-end backend development of features and components across their entire life cycle (design, develop, test, deploy, maintain)
  • Work closely with peers across different geo teams and disciplines to shape solutions and integrate with other parts of the product
  • Contribute to team-wide efforts - code reviews, design reviews, technical and architectural decisions
  • Production oriented approach with providing real time mitigation and solutions to production issues

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

  • M.S/B.S degree in Computer Science or equivalent and 10+ years of software engineering experience, including development of a scalable server-side application
  • Extensive hands-on programming skills in Go, Java and/or Python
  • Strong computer science fundamentals (e.g. understanding of lock-free data structures, bloom filters, minimal perfect hashing, consistent hashing etc)
  • Proven Experience with cloud platforms (e.g. GCP / AWS / Azure)
  • Experience with Microservices architecture (Kubernetes, GKE, EKS, AKS, Docker, Serverless, etc)
  • Experience with big–data architectures (using Kafka, Splunk, Flink, etc)
  • Experience with distributed computing (understand implications of CAP theorem, master election, brain split problem) and/or distributed DB/KVP (BigQuery,, Elastic Search, Kafka and SingleStore)
  • Hands-on experience with SQL/NoSQL based databases

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience working in an agile and dynamic environment
  • High energy and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment with a can-do attitude
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and cloud infra
  • Familiarity with Cyber Technologies, Information Security, and Software Security is plus

Our Commitment

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.

Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

title: Backend Engineer
descriptionHtml:
What will you do?

  • Own and deliver well-defined backend features and services across Newtap’s lending and financial infrastructure platforms.
  • Build and maintain APIs and backend systems powering loan workflows, KYC, payments, collections, and financial integrations.
  • Contribute to scalable microservices and event-driven systems with guidance from senior engineers.
  • Work on improving reliability, observability, performance, and maintainability of backend services.
  • Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Designers, and senior engineers to understand requirements and translate them into production-ready systems.
  • Participate in debugging, production issue resolution, and operational improvements with a strong ownership mindset.
  • Learn and adopt engineering best practices around testing, code quality, deployment, monitoring, and system design.
  • Leverage AI-assisted engineering workflows to improve development speed, debugging, and learning.
  • Work effectively within your immediate team while developing understanding of adjacent systems like Risk, Payments, KYC, Data, and Platform services.


You should apply if you have:

  • 1–3 years of backend development experience with exposure to production systems.
  • Hands-on coding experience in Java/Spring Boot or similar backend technologies.
  • Understanding of APIs, databases, caching, asynchronous workflows, and microservices fundamentals.
  • Strong learning mindset with the ability to independently ship features with guidance on complex technical decisions.
  • Ability to write clean, maintainable, and testable code leveraging AI
  • Strong debugging and problem-solving mindset and leverage AI for achieving the analysis.
  • Interest in building fintech or consumer-facing technology products.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively within fast-paced and high-ownership environments.
  • Curiosity to learn distributed systems, observability, scalability, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.

title: Backend Engineer
descriptionHtml:
About Shopflo

At Shopflo, we're trying to change the way consumers experience brands and businesses. Our first product was a cart and checkout platform for e-commerce, that allowed marketers to personalise discounts, rewards, and payments. We are currently also working on a new product that takes it a notch higher by unlocking enterprise-grade personalization for all consumer tech businesses.

Team & Company

Shopflo was founded by three co-founders:

  • Ankit Bansal (ex-IIT Kharagpur, Oracle, Gupshup)
  • Ishan Rakshit (ex-IIT Bombay, Parthenon, Elevation Capital)
  • Priy Ranjan (ex-IIT Madras, McKinsey, Elevation Capital)

We’re a fast-growing team of ~50 people, based in HSR Layout, Bengaluru. We raised a $3.8M seed round from Tiger Global, TQ Ventures.

 What You Will Do

  • Design and develop microservice that can work in a large-scale multi-tenant environment.
  • Explore design implications and work towards an appropriate balance between functionality, performance, and maintainability.
  • Working with a cross-discipline team of Design, Product, Data Science and Analytics team.
  • Deploy and maintain the application in a secured AWS environment.
  • Take ownership from the ideation phase to deployment and maintenance.
  • Active participation in the hiring process to bring world-class programmers in the team.

You Should Apply If You Have

  • 2-4 years of experience in server-side development
  • Strong programming skills in Java, Python, Node or Golang
  • Hands-on experience in API development and frameworks such as Spring, Node, or Django.
  • Good Understanding of SQL and NoSQL databases.
  • Experience in test-driven development. (writing unit test and API test).
  • Understanding of basic cloud computing concepts and experience in using any of the major cloud service providers(AWS/GCP/Azure).
  • Ability to build and deploy the application in a containerized environment.
  • Understanding of application logging and monitoring systems like Prometheus or Kibana.
  • B. E/B. Tech/M. E. /M. Tech/M. S. from a reputed university with a good academic record.
  • Curiosity to explore cutting-edge technologies and bake them into the products.
  • Zeal and drive to take end-to-end ownership.

Skills:- Java, Python, NodeJS (Node.js), Go Programming (Golang), Redis, PostgreSQL and SQL

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Role: Frontend Engineer

Function: Frontend Engineering

Location: Bangalore, India (Onsite)

Type: Full-time

Industry: E-learning, Education Management, SaaS


About Company

The company is a cloud-based tutor management platform built for tutoring businesses, online educators, and test prep providers. It automates scheduling, payments, attendance, and course delivery for over 2,000 businesses.

The team is lean — just 35 people, based in Bangalore. Engineers get direct ownership, ship real features, and work without bureaucracy.

It's fast-paced, mission-driven work with real impact on how education businesses operate and scale.


Position Overview

We're looking for a React Frontend Engineer who can build and ship production-ready features for a platform used by thousands of education businesses. You'll work closely with product and backend teams, translate requirements into clean UI, and take full ownership of features from development to release. This is a hands-on role in a fast-paced environment where speed, quality, and product thinking all matter.


Role & Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain production-ready frontend features using React and modern JavaScript
  • Translate product requirements into clean, functional, and responsive UI components
  • Integrate frontend with REST APIs and handle async data flows reliably
  • Debug and resolve UI issues thoroughly — root cause fixes, not patches
  • Take full ownership of features from development through release and post-launch monitoring
  • Improve performance, accessibility, and code quality continuously across the codebase

descriptionHtml:
About the projects: we are building LLM evaluation and training datasets to train LLM to work on realistic software engineering problems. One of our approaches, in this project, is to build verifiable SWE tasks based on public repository histories in a synthetic approach with human-in-the-loop; while expanding the dataset coverage to different types of tasks in terms of programming language, difficulty level, and etc.


About the Role:

We are looking for experienced software engineers (tech lead level) who are familiar with high-quality public GitHub repositories and can contribute to this project. This role involves hands-on software engineering work, including development environment automation, issue triaging, and evaluating test coverage and quality


Why Join Us?

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems. You’ll be at the forefront of evaluating how LLMs interact with real code, influencing the future of AI-assisted software development. This is a unique opportunity to blend practical software engineering with AI research.


What does day-to-day look like:

  • Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open-source libraries.
  • Set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup.
  • Evaluating unit test coverage and quality.
  • Modify and run codebases locally to assess LLM performance in bug-fixing scenarios.
  • Collaborate with researchers to design and identify repositories and issues that are challenging for LLMs.
  • Opportunities to lead a team of junior engineers to collaborate on projects.


Required Skills:

  • Minimum 3+ years of overall experience
  • Strong experience with at least one of the following languages: Java
  • Proficiency with Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup.
  • Ability to understand and navigate complex codebases.
  • Comfortable running, modifying, and testing real-world projects locally.
  • Experience contributing to or evaluating open-source projects is a plus.


Nice to Have:

  • Previous participation in LLM research or evaluation projects.
  • Experience building or testing developer tools or automation agents.
  • Perks of Freelancing With Turing:
  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.


Offer Details:

  • Commitments Required: At least 4 hours per day and minimum 20 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST. (We have 3 options of time commitment: 20 hrs/week, 30 hrs/week or 40 hrs/week)
  • Employment type: Contractor assignment (no medical/paid leave)


After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.

title: SDE-2 - Backend Engineer (Freelancer)
descriptionHtml:
About Us

Deccan AI Experts is a pioneering AI company founded by IIT Bombay and IIM Ahmedabad alumni, with a strong founding team from IITs, NITs, and BITS. We specialize in high-quality human-curated data, AI-first operations, and advanced AI evaluation systems.


About the Role

We are looking for an SDE-2 – Backend Engineer (Freelancer) to support advanced AI evaluation initiatives focused on backend development, distributed systems, API design, cloud infrastructure, database engineering, and scalable software architecture.

In this role, you will work with AI-generated outputs related to backend services, microservices, APIs, databases, performance optimization, system design, and software engineering best practices, helping improve how AI models understand and generate high-quality backend solutions.

Your expertise will contribute to improving AI systems used for intelligent coding assistants, cloud-native applications, enterprise software platforms, and large-scale backend engineering workflows.


Responsibilities

  • Create deliverables addressing common requests within your professional domain
  • Annotate and evaluate AI-generated backend engineering and software development outputs
  • Review peer-developed deliverables to improve AI research quality and consistency
  • Assess AI outputs for code quality, scalability, reliability, security, performance, and maintainability
  • Identify architectural flaws, inefficient implementations, concurrency issues, database bottlenecks, API design problems, or security vulnerabilities in AI-generated solutions and provide structured feedback
  • Support workflows involving backend development, distributed systems, microservices, cloud platforms, databases, and system design
  • Contribute domain expertise to improve AI systems focused on backend engineering and intelligent software development


Requirements

  • Strong proficiency in at least one backend programming language such as Java, Python, Go, C++, Node.js, or similar technologies
  • Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, object-oriented design, and software engineering principles
  • Experience building RESTful APIs, backend services, and scalable web applications
  • Strong knowledge of relational and NoSQL databases, query optimization, and data modeling
  • Familiarity with distributed systems, microservices architecture, caching, messaging systems, and performance tuning
  • Experience with cloud platforms, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps workflows is preferred
  • Strong analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment


Why Join Us

  • Competitive hourly pay: ₹1500/hour
  • Fully remote with flexible working hours
  • Opportunity to contribute to cutting-edge AI and software engineering research
  • Exposure to AI-powered coding systems, cloud technologies, and intelligent backend platforms
  • Flexible project-based opportunities with global teams

title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
About the Company :

Vagaro is a global leader in cloud-based business management software, serving the salon, spa, beauty, fitness, and wellness industries. Our platform enables businesses to manage scheduling, payments, marketing, and operations from one centralized system.

We are a rapidly growing, product-led company transforming how wellness businesses operate and connect with their customers.

Why Join Us :

  • 5-day work week & flexible schedule
  • Fun Fridays, Tech sessions & cultural events
  • Learning resources & gaming zones
  • Annual bonus & recognition programs
  • Leave encashment & maternity benefits
  • 15 Paid Leaves + 11 Holidays
  • Comprehensive family medical insurance

💼 Role: Full stack engineer (AI-First)

📍 Location: Ahmedabad (Work from Office)

🎓 Education: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or related field

Role Overview

We are looking for a Full Stack Engineer who builds with AI, not just alongside it. If you have genuinely integrated AI tools into your daily coding workflow and can ship production-grade React frontends and .NET Core APIs, we want to talk.

What you will do:

  • Build and maintain responsive web applications using React (hooks, state management, modern patterns)
  • Design, develop, and optimize RESTful APIs using .NET Core / ASP.NET Core
  • Work with SQL/NoSQL databases, write efficient queries, and design clean schemas
  • Own features end-to-end — from API contract to deployed UI
  • Use AI coding tools (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, etc.) as a core part of your workflow to ship faster and better
  • Collaborate on architecture, code reviews, and technical decisions

Must-haves:

  • 3–7 years of hands-on full stack development experience
  • Strong proficiency in React (functional components, hooks, modern tooling)
  • Strong proficiency in .NET Core / C# for API development
  • Solid understanding of REST APIs, authentication (JWT/OAuth), and database design
  • Hands-on experience using AI coding assistants in real projects — not just experimenting
  • Understanding of AI-assisted development workflows: effective prompting, context management, code review of AI output, knowing when to trust and when to verify
  • Git, CI/CD basics, and clean coding practices

If you are excited to build real products in an AI-first environment and grow with a fast-moving team, we would love to hear from you.

- 3–7 years of hands-on full stack development experience
- Strong proficiency in React (functional components, hooks, modern tooling)
- Strong proficiency in .NET Core / C# for API development
- Solid understanding of REST APIs, authentication (JWT/OAuth), and database design
- Hands-on experience using AI coding assistants in real projects — not just experimenting
- Understanding of AI-assisted development workflows: effective prompting, context management, code review of AI output, knowing when to trust and when to verify
- Git, CI/CD basics, and clean coding practices
 
If you are excited to build real products in an AI-first environment and grow with a fast-moving team, we would love to hear from you.

descriptionHtml:
Why Join IDX?


  • Not Just Any Brands: See your work come to life for iconic brands like Vodafone, Rolls Royce and Diageo.
  • Collaborative Spirit: Work alongside passionate innovators who share your thirst for progress.
  • Continuous Learning: Grow your skills with ongoing training, mentorship, and the freedom to experiment.
  • Fast Paced & Fun: Thrive in a dynamic environment where big ideas and bold action collide.
  • Cutting-Edge Technology: Play with the latest analytics tools, use AR to build immersive digital events, and explore the future of brand storytelling!
  • Global Presence: We Get It Done morning, day and night with offices across multiple time-zones!


Our Perks:


  • 29 paid annual leave days.
  • 10 Festival holidays (including 1 optional Holiday for your special day through the year).
  • Family Insurance Plan.
  • Accident Insurance Plan.
  • Regular Wellness Sessions.
  • Regular Rewards & Recognition.
  • Opportunity to participate in CSR.
  • Opportunity to participate and involve in Cultural and Sporting Events.


The Gig:


We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer with strong experience in Node.js, React, and Next.js, along with database knowledge in SQL (PostgreSQL) and MongoDB. The ideal candidate should be comfortable building scalable web applications, APIs, and modern UI interfaces.


What You'll Be Doing:


  • Develop and maintain scalable web applications using React and Next.js.
  • Build robust backend services and APIs using Node.js.
  • Design and optimize databases using PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (QA, UI/UX, Product).

About You:


  • Strong experience with JavaScript / TypeScript.

title: Fullstack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Experience: 1.00 + years

Salary: INR 1400000-1700000 / year (based on experience)

Expected Notice Period: 15 Days

Shift: (GMT+05:30) Asia/Kolkata (IST)

Opportunity Type: Hybrid ()

Placement Type: Full Time Permanent position(Payroll and Compliance to be managed by: FinRight)

(*Note: This is a requirement for one of Uplers' client - FinRight)

What do you need for this opportunity?

Must have skills required:

AWS, Express Js, MongoDB, Node Js, React Js

FinRight is Looking for:

We are looking for a Full Stack Developer (MERN / AWS / AI preferred) with 1-3 years of experience to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining secure, scalable web applications that power our financial products. You will work primarily on the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js ), deploy and manage applications on AWS, and (where applicable) integrate

Responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and maintain web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js ).
  • Build responsive, reusable UI components and front-end interfaces using React.js, HTML5 CSS3 and modern JavaScript (ES6+).
  • Develop secure, scalable REST APIs and backend services in Node.js / Express.js .
  • Work on end-to-end feature development: requirements understanding, technical design, implementation, testing, and deployment.
  • Integrate internal and third-party financial APIs and services.
  • Deploy, monitor, and optimise applications on AWS (e. g., EC2 S3 RDS/Lambda, CloudWatch, API Gateway) following best practices.
  • Work with MongoDB (and optionally relational databases) for data modelling, queries, and performance optimisation.
  • Collaborate closely with Product, Design, QA, and Business teams to deliver features aligned with business goals and regulatory requirements.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and testable code, participate in code reviews, and follow standard coding guidelines.
  • Troubleshoot production issues, perform root-cause analysis, and implement fixes and improvements.
  • Contribute to documentation (technical specifications, API docs, configuration notes, runbooks).
  • Preferably: Integrate AI services (e. g., LLM APIs, recommendation/analytics APIs, chatbots, embeddings) into existing applications.


Requirements:

  • 1-3 years of hands-on experience as a Full Stack / MERN Stack Developer working on live production projects.
  • Experience in taking features from concept to production deployment.
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and React.js .
  • Good understanding of HTML5 CSS, 3 responsive designs, and cross-browser compatibility.
  • Experience building reusable components and managing state (e. g., React hooks, Context API, or Redux).
  • Strong proficiency in Node.js and Express.js .
  • Experience in building and consuming RESTful APIs.
  • Good understanding of authentication, authorisation, and common security practices (JWT, OAuth, etc. ).
  • Hands-on experience with MongoDB (schema design, queries, indexing).
  • Basic understanding of relational databases (e. g., PostgreSQL/MySQL) is a plus.
  • Practical, working experience deploying at least one application on AWS.
  • Familiarity with core services such as EC2 S3 RDS, DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, and CloudWatch.
  • Understanding of basic CI/CD concepts and using Git-based workflows.
  • Solid understanding of REST, JSON, and HTTP fundamentals.
  • Experience with Git and standard branching/merge workflows.
  • Ability to debug issues across the stack (frontend, backend, database, cloud).
  • Experience working in fintech / financial services (payments, lending, investments, personal finance, insurance, etc. ).
  • Exposure to AI/ML APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, or similar), vector databases, or recommendation systems.
  • Familiarity with TypeScript on frontend and/or backend.
  • Basic knowledge of Docker or container-based deployments.
  • Understanding of OWASP and security considerations for handling financial and personal data.
  • Experience with logging, monitoring, and performance tuning on AWS.
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Good verbal and written communication.
  • Ability to work in an agile, fast-paced environment.
  • Ownership mindset with attention to detail and quality.
  • Willingness to learn new technologies and adapt to changing business needs.


How to apply for this opportunity?

  • Step 1: Click On Apply! And Register or Login on our portal.
  • Step 2: Complete the Screening Form & Upload updated Resume
  • Step 3: Increase your chances to get shortlisted & meet the client for the Interview!


About Uplers:

Our goal is to make hiring reliable, simple, and fast. Our role will be to help all our talents find and apply for relevant contractual onsite opportunities and progress in their career. We will support any grievances or challenges you may face during the engagement.

(Note: There are many more opportunities apart from this on the portal. Depending on the assessments you clear, you can apply for them as well).

So, if you are ready for a new challenge, a great work environment, and an opportunity to take your career to the next level, don't hesitate to apply today. We are waiting for you!

title: Fullstack Developer (India)
descriptionHtml:
We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to join our growing engineering team. In this role, you will design, build, and operate scalable software platforms that support analytics and AI solutions — owning the full journey from intuitive user interfaces to robust cloud-native backends.

What This Involves:

Front-End Development

  • Develop and maintain user interfaces for web applications using React and Next.js.
  • Translate wireframes and design mockups into functional, accessible UI components.
  • Identify and resolve front-end performance bottlenecks to ensure smooth user experiences.
  • Write and maintain unit and integration tests for front-end components (e.g. Jest, React Testing Library).

Back-End Development

  • Develop and maintain high-quality back-end services and APIs using Python.
  • Deploy, operate, and monitor applications in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
  • Manage containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes.
  • Contribute to the design and evolution of scalable, cloud-native software architectures.
  • Contribute to and maintain CI/CD pipelines for web and back-end applications.

Collaboration and Quality

  • Work closely with data scientists, engineers and project managers to deliver integrated end-to-end solutions.
  • Support the development and deployment of AI and analytics solutions.
  • Write clean, well-documented, and maintainable code across the full stack.
  • Participate in technical discussions, code reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Adhere to internal and client-mandated data protection and compliance policies, ensuring all handling, storage, and sharing of data meets required security and privacy standards.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related fields.
  • 5+ years of software development experience, with meaningful time on both front-end and back-end systems.
  • Experience designing systems in cloud-native or distributed environments is a plus.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills — comfortable working across cross-functional and client-facing teams.
  • Ability to overlap with Pacific Time business hours for a minimum of 3 hours per day.

Key Competencies:

  • Stakeholder Mentality: Treats the company's and client’s goals as their own and is genuinely motivated by its success.
  • Organisational Excellence: Manages time and priorities effectively, ensuring tasks are completed accurately and on time even in a fast-paced environment.
  • Discretion & Integrity: Handles sensitive and confidential information with professionalism and sound judgement.
  • Problem Solving: Approaches challenges proactively and with a solution-oriented mindset, taking initiative rather than waiting to be directed.
  • Collaboration: A team player who builds strong working relationships and communicates effectively with colleagues across all levels.

Why You Will Love It Here:

  • Work on real-world AI and advanced analytics solutions with measurable business impact.
  • Collaborate with a global team of engineers and data scientists.
  • Exposure to diverse industries, modern cloud platforms, and cutting-edge AI technologies.
  • A collaborative culture that values real outcomes.
  • Rapid learning opportunities and diverse challenges.
  • Flat organisational hierarchy with high visibility and accessibility to our leaders.

title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Greetings,


Role: Full Stack Engineer (TypeScript)

Exp Level: 5 to 8 years

Job location: Gurgaon, Hyderabad & Coimbatore

Work Mode: Hybrid

Websites: WPP & Verticurl


Role purpose

We are seeking a highly motivated and adaptable Software Engineer to join our Unite team. You will be a key contributor to our technology platform which embraces the latest approaches to effective product engineering, including microservices, monorepo, serverless and continuous deployment. Day-to-day you will work within a small, self-managed team (2-5 people) focused on delivering high-quality software in a fast-paced, agile environment. This role emphasizes autonomy, collaboration, and a proactive approach to problem-solving.


Key Responsibilities

• Self-Management & Task Prioritization: Independently manage and prioritize your own tasks, aligning with team goals and project objectives. Maintain a personal task list and effectively manage your time to meet deliverables.

• Active Participation in Team Processes: Engage fully in daily team meetings, utilizing screen-sharing and presentations to communicate updates, clarify priorities, and collaborate on solutions. Actively participate in bi-weekly team demos to showcase progress, discuss challenges, and present plans.

• Proactive Communication & Collaboration: Clearly communicate progress, potential roadblocks, and adjusted timelines to the team. Seek validation and feedback from tech leads and senior team members to ensure alignment with project expectations. Iterate on work progress with team members, fostering a collaborative environment and ensuring high-quality deliverables.

• Embrace Change & Adaptability: Demonstrate flexibility and adaptability in response to evolving project requirements. Proactively adjust work plans and deliverables as needed to meet changing priorities and contribute to achieving project goals.

• Effective Handoff Planning: Prepare thorough handoff documentation and delegate tasks effectively when planning time off, ensuring seamless continuity of work within the team. Utilize Core Tools: Leverage Microsoft Teams for communication, Figma for design, and GitHub for code, documentation, and optional issue tracking. While issue tracking in GitHub is available, personal task management can be maintained using any preferred method


Skill Requirements

We’re ideally looking for someone who is comfortable across the entire stack and can take ownership of feature delivery from design to deployment. The ideal candidate should have:

General Engineering Experience:

• Git Version Control (Required)

• Jest (Required)

• Continuous Integration (Required)

• Playwright (or similar testing framework like Cypress)

• Monorepo

• GitHub Actions

• Continuous Deployment

• Experience with AI models APIs (OpenAI, Google Gemini or similar)


Frontend Technology Experience:

• Typescript (Required)

• React (Required)

• HTML (Required)

• CSS (Required)

• MicroFrontends

• React Router

• Zustand (or similar state management tool like redux)

• RxJS

• Design systems (antd, material-ui or similar)

• Figma (interpreting designs)


Backend Technology Experience:

• Typescript (Required)

• AWS Lambda (Required)

• Microservices (Required)

• API Gateway (Required)

• S3 (Required)

• Serverless architectures (Required)

• Document Databases e.g. MongoDB, DynamoDB, ElasticSearch or similar (Required)

• Infrastructure as Code (Serverless, CloudFormation, Terraform or similar)

• DynamoDB

• SQS

• Cognito


About Us:

Verticurl, is a WPP company, was established in 2006 with the mission to be the world’s leading marketing technology services agency for multinational organizations. We enable our clients to assess, deploy, integrate and support MarTech platforms, activate customer experience technologies, implement lead management processes that accelerate revenue conversion and leverage marketing technology to achieve operational excellence. Since then, the company has grown at a phenomenal rate, with over 1,200 team members and presence in the United States, Canada, Brazil, Australia, Singapore, UK, Japan, Korea, Thailand, Mexico, Costa Rica, India, Indonesia, Vietnam, and Greater China. Our global marketing automation, demand generation and digital strategy specialists support our customers in more than 14 different languages and in a variety of industry sectors, including High Tech, Banking, Insurance and Financial Services, Manufacturing, Healthcare and Consumer Electronics.


WPP is a large holding company involved in communications, advertising, public relations, and other businesses. It is considered the world's biggest advertising agency group. WPP focuses on communications, experience, commerce, and technology headquartered in London, England. WPP has approximately 130,000 employees throughout its portfolio of businesses across more than 100 countries.


Verticurl is a Marketing Technology Services Agency that specializes in driving customer engagement, improving customer experience and increasing revenue generation by maximizing the use of Marketing Technologies for multi-national brands.

Please read through our website www.wpp.com to help support your preparation.


What's Next? Upon shortlist, the next step in the interview process will be two technical discussions.

What do you need? Please ensure you have a quiet space, stable internet access, and a working camera, and microphone available for your interview.

How to prepare?

  • Brainstorm personal examples of leadership, teamwork, challenging situations you were able to work through, etc.
  • Be able to explain why you are interested in the Fullstack role?
  • Brainstorm questions you can ask the interviewer about Verticurl, WPP or the role to demonstrate your interest in this opportunity

To be Focused on:

  • Learn about Verticurl and WPP
  • React, Typescript, HTML, CSS
  • AWS, Microservices, MongoDB


Regards,

Naveen

Verticurl, is a WPP company, was established in 2006 with the mission to be the world’s leading marketing technology services agency for multinational organizations. We enable our clients to assess, deploy, integrate and support MarTech platforms, activate customer experience technologies, implement lead management processes that accelerate revenue conversion and leverage marketing technology to achieve operational excellence. Since then, the company has grown at a phenomenal rate, with over 1,200 team members and presence in the United States, Canada, Brazil, Australia, Singapore, UK, Japan, Korea, Thailand, Mexico, Costa Rica, India, Indonesia, Vietnam, and Greater China. Our global marketing automation, demand generation and digital strategy specialists support our customers in more than 14 different languages and in a variety of industry sectors, including High Tech, Banking, Insurance and Financial Services, Manufacturing, Healthcare and Consumer Electronics.


WPP is a large holding company involved in communications, advertising, public relations, and other businesses. It is considered the world's biggest advertising agency group. WPP focuses on communications, experience, commerce, and technology headquartered in London, England. WPP has approximately 130,000 employees throughout its portfolio of businesses across more than 100 countries.


Verticurl is a Marketing Technology Services Agency that specializes in driving customer engagement, improving customer experience and increasing revenue generation by maximizing the use of Marketing Technologies for multi-national brands.
Please read through our website www.wpp.com to help support your preparation.


What's Next? Upon shortlist, the next step in the interview process will be two technical discussions.
What do you need? Please ensure you have a quiet space, stable internet access, and a working camera, and microphone available for your interview.
How to prepare?

- Brainstorm personal examples of leadership, teamwork, challenging situations you were able to work through, etc.
- Be able to explain why you are interested in the Fullstack role?
- Brainstorm questions you can ask the interviewer about Verticurl, WPP or the role to demonstrate your interest in this opportunity
To be Focused on:

- Learn about Verticurl and WPP
- React, Typescript, HTML, CSS
- AWS, Microservices, MongoDB


Regards,
Naveen

title: Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
We're Hiring: Full-Stack Developer

We're looking for a Full-Stack Developer to take ownership of a growing software platform in the renewable energy sector.

Our platform includes a mobile application used by field teams, multiple web applications for business operations, a backend system that powers everything, and advanced 3D design tools used for project planning and visualization. As we continue to expand, we're looking for someone who can maintain, improve, and help build the next generation of these products.


What You'll Be Doing

  • Building and improving web and mobile applications
  • Developing new features across frontend and backend systems
  • Working on interactive 3D visualization and design tools
  • Troubleshooting and fixing bugs across multiple products
  • Managing deployments and production environments
  • Maintaining databases, servers, and application infrastructure
  • Integrating and maintaining third-party services
  • Participating in product planning and technical decision-making
  • Ensuring applications remain secure, reliable, and scalable

What We're Looking For

  • 2–4 years of professional full-stack development experience
  • Strong frontend development skills and modern web application experience
  • Experience working with backend APIs and databases
  • Understanding of deployment, hosting, DNS, and production environments
  • Familiarity with version control and collaborative development workflows
  • Ability to work independently and take ownership of projects
  • Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn new technologies

Nice to Have

  • Experience with mobile app development
  • Experience with 3D graphics, visualization, or interactive web applications
  • Exposure to cloud infrastructure and DevOps practices
  • Experience integrating payment, messaging, or external service APIs
  • Experience working in startups or fast-moving product teams

Who You'll Thrive Here

We're looking for someone who enjoys ownership, learns quickly, and is comfortable working across different parts of a product. You'll have the opportunity to work on a wide variety of challenges—from user-facing features to infrastructure and advanced visualization tools.


Location

Charmwood Village, Surajkund, Faridabad


Interested?

Send your resume and portfolio/GitHub profile to [sarvesh@gridzero.in].

title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
We turn six ad platforms into one honest dashboard and let a Claude-powered analyst tell marketers where their money is leaking. You'll build the thing that does that.


About us -

Overads is a single tracker for paid campaigns - Meta, Google, Reddit, LinkedIn, X, Snapchat - synced nightly and summarized every morning by an AI that flags wasted spend before standup. Around that we've got Creative Studio, multi-platform Publish, brand-mention Signals, and a full CRM. It's a lot of surface area. That's the fun part.


What you'll actually do -

  • Ship across the whole stack: Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript on the front, NestJS + Postgres + Drizzle + BullMQ/Redis on the back, AWS (KMS, S3, SES, Lambda, SQS) underneath.
  • Wrangle OAuth flows for a dozen platforms that all read the same docs and somehow implemented them differently.
  • Make money math correct, minor-unit bigints, six currencies, zero float drift. If a number is wrong, someone's budget is wrong.
  • Build features that touch real AI loops (Claude tool-use for suggestions, Gemini for content), not just a chat box bolted onto a CRUD app.
  • Care about tenant isolation like it's a religion, because it is.


You'll fit if you -

  • Are genuinely full-stack — you don't flinch at a migration or a flexbox bug.
  • Have shipped TypeScript in production and have opinions about it (we'll ask).
  • Think "it typechecks" is the floor, not the ceiling.
  • Can read someone else's connector code without sighing audibly. (Okay, one sigh.)


Bonus points-

Drizzle/Prisma scars · queue-and-cron war stories · you've integrated an ad platform API and lived · you've debugged a native binary that "was definitely installed."

Red flags for you: you need a 14-step ticket to change a button. We move faster than that.

Perks: small team, large ownership, your code is in front of real ad budgets on day one, and an AI that writes your standup notes (we're working on it).


👉 Apply with a project you're proud of and one bug that still haunts you.

title: React.js developer
descriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities-

  • Develop and maintain responsive web applications using React.js.
  • Build and manage backend functionalities using PHP and Laravel.
  • Integrate frontend applications with APIs and databases.
  • Write clean, efficient, and reusable code.

  • Collaborate with designers, project managers, and fellow developers to deliver high-quality solutions.

Frontend

  • Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.

  • Good communication and teamwork skills.

title: Software Engineer
descriptionHtml:
About the Company

We are looking for a Software Engineer who doesn’t just write code—but uses AI to accelerate, optimize, and rethink development workflows. You’ll build scalable systems while leveraging tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and ChatGPT to improve productivity and code quality. This role sits at the intersection of software engineering + applied AI, not pure ML research.


About the Role

Responsibilities

  • Develop quality software and web application
  • Analyze and maintain existing software application
  • Design highly scalable, testable code
  • Discover and fix programming bugs


AI-Augmented Development

  • Use AI tools to generate and optimize code
  • Debug faster
  • Automate repetitive tasks
  • Build internal workflows using LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
  • Integrate AI into products (chatbots, copilots, automation layers)


System Thinking + Productivity

  • Reduce engineering effort using automation
  • Improve dev velocity (target: 2–5x productivity vs traditional devs)
  • Evaluate when AI helps vs when manual coding is better


Collaboration

  • Work with product, design, and data teams
  • Translate business problems into technical + AI-driven solutions


Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science or related field
  • Development experience with programming languages
  • SQL database or relational database skills
  • Strong in at least one:
  • JavaScript (Node.js / React)
  • Python
  • Java / Go
  • Solid understanding of:
  • APIs (REST/GraphQL)
  • Databases (SQL/NoSQL)
  • Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure)


What Success Looks Like

  • Ships features faster than traditional engineers
  • Uses AI to reduce development time by 30–70%
  • Builds scalable systems with AI embedded, not bolted on

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Engineer ready to make an impact? Singularis Ventures is looking for a passionate Software Engineer to join our growing team in our global capacity centre.

This is a full-time, onsite role based in Kochi, Kerala, with working hours aligned to the India/UK timezone. You will be a key contributor to a critical project for a UK-based University Group, designing, building, and deploying innovative, high-quality software solutions.

Please note: This role requires participation in a 24/7 on-call rotation.

What You'll Do

  • Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using

Node.js, React.js, TypeScript, and MongoDB.

  • Build and manage scalable, secure cloud infrastructure on

AWS using Terraform for infrastructure as code.

  • Develop serverless applications with

AWS Lambda, manage APIs with API Gateway, and utilize S3 for storage.

  • Write robust automated tests with

Cypress to ensure the quality and reliability of our code.

  • Collaborate with product managers and designers in an agile environment to release value early and often.

What We're Looking For

  • 3+ years of professional experience as a Full Stack Software Engineer.
  • A Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
  • Strong, hands-on experience with our core tech stack:

Node.js, React.js, TypeScript, and MongoDB.

  • Proven experience with

AWS services (IAM, Lambda, API Gateway, S3) and Terraform.

  • Proficiency with version control using

Git and experience with CI/CD pipelines.

Why Join Us?

We offer a competitive salary with a performance-based bonus, comprehensive medical insurance, and excellent professional development opportunities. Join us and help shape the future of work!

If you're ready to take your career to the next level, apply now!
